title: Kyrstenia pazcuarensis
constituents: Kyrstenia pazcuarensis contains various active constituents, although they have not been extensively documented. More research is needed to identify and describe the plant's active compounds. However, some studies suggest that it may possess flavonoids, alkaloids, and other secondary metabolites. These constituents could be responsible for its potential medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Further investigation is necessary to confirm the exact composition and effects of Kyrstenia pazcuarensis.
